flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Edgecombe Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (938 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Edgecombe Community College rose 425% between 2006 and 2009 (8.6% → 45.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Edgecombe Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6% → 0.0%).
